summary: Completed frontend testing of 3 UI refinements for Girogirotondo kindergarten app. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page subtitle shows 'La tua scuola a portata di mano' under school name
Login card has solid white bg (bg-white) with shadow-md
Quick login section has solid white background (no semi-transparent bg-white/60)
Login page background uses cream gradient (#FFFDD0 to #FFF8E1)
Teacher Media page has hidden native file input (type=file, accept=image/*,video/*)
Teacher Media upload modal opens with native file picker area (no mock placeholder images)
Teacher Media modal shows 'Tocca per selezionare foto o video' prompt
Teacher Media modal has vertical student checklist with individual checkboxes
Teacher Media modal has 'Seleziona Tutti' button that toggles all student checkboxes
Teacher Media modal shows student count (0/3, 3/3) next to Seleziona Tutti
Teacher Media modal caption input works correctly
Teacher Media modal upload button present and functional
Parent Dashboard cards (Diario, Griglia, Alimentazione) have shadow-md
Admin Dashboard stat cards (4) have shadow-md
Admin Dashboard nav cards (users, classes, appointments, modulistica) have shadow-md
Teacher Dashboard action cards (griglia, media) have shadow-md
Teacher Dashboard students list has shadow-md
All pages use solid cream background (#FFFDD0 = rgb(255, 253, 208))
GDPR footer is visible on all dashboards
Footer text visible above bottom nav on mobile (pb-20 padding working)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent in TeacherMedia.jsx missing aria-describedby attribute (console warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI refinements tested and working: 1) Login subtitle 'La tua scuola a portata di mano', 2) Teacher Media modal with native file picker and student checklist with Seleziona Tutti, 3) shadow-md on all cards across Parent/Admin/Teacher dashboards. Auth is MOCKED (mock JWT). Database uses seeded test data.
